title: agastache breviflora var. harvardii
intro: Agastache breviflora var. harvardii, also known as Harvard Compact Hummingbird Mint or Klamath Sage, is a perennial plant species native to the western United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and promoting digestion. The leaves and flowers of Agastache breviflora var. harvardii can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
